name: 12306 MCP
what_it_does: An MCP server that enables AI models to search Chinese railway (12306) train tickets, query station stops, filter train info, and find multi-leg transfer routes.
use_cases: Searching available train tickets between Chinese cities via AI assistant
Finding optimal transfer routes for multi-leg train journeys
Querying stop-by-stop station information for a specific train
not_for: Booking or purchasing train tickets (search only)
Real-time train tracking or delay information
best_when: An agent needs to search Chinese railway ticket availability or plan train routes within China.
avoid_when: You need to book tickets, handle payments, or search non-Chinese rail systems.

auth.notes: No authentication required. Queries the public 12306 API.

pricing.notes: MIT licensed, fully open source. Queries free public 12306 data.

performance.rate_limits: Subject to 12306 upstream rate limits which are undocumented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Documentation is primarily in Chinese. Error handling details not documented in README.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only search queries are inherently idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Documentation and tool descriptions are primarily in Chinese - agents may struggle with non-Chinese language contexts
Dependent on 12306 upstream availability which can be unreliable during peak travel seasons
Station names must use Chinese characters or station codes
No ticket purchasing capability - search only

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
